title: Refactor flat God-schema into core + embedded profile + split changesets
prompt: Refactor test_fixtures/god_schema_user.ex: (1) extract profile fields (bio, avatar_url, phone) into an embedded MyApp.Accounts.Profile, (2) User embeds_one :profile, (3) split changesets into registration_changeset (email, name, password_hash), profile_changeset (name + cast_embed :profile), admin_changeset (is_admin, role, subscription_tier), credit_balance_changeset (credit_balance). Module file to lib/my_app/accounts/user.ex.
tier_rationale: Multi-step refactor combining extraction, embedding, and changeset splitting. Hard because the coordination is non-trivial.
